---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature for the ingestion/detection pipeline
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What gap or limitation does this address? Link to the "Known gaps / TODOs"
section of the README if relevant.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see implemented.

## Shared contract impact

Does this change `RiskScore`, the asset pair identifier format, or the
feature schema consumed by other LedgerLens repos? If so, note what needs
to change in `ledgerlens-core` and which repos to notify.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them.
